actions.log_skip: Alliance tab not found — backing out of alliance store purchase
actions.note: Step 1: open the alliance tab, trying every known icon variant

Step 5: find the shop card for the shield type selected in farm settings. The icon-only templates avoid the mutable Storage:N text; tap 55px below the icon centre (measured from btn_alliance_store_* captures) so the tap lands on the Storage bar, not the dead inner icon

actions.log_success: Buy button tapped — waiting for purchase confirmation
actions.log_skip: Buy button not found — nothing to purchase
actions.note: Step 7: attempt the buy. Success is confirmed by the congratulations popup below, not by this tap — a tapped buy can still fail (e.g. not enough alliance points)

actions.log_skip: Not purchased — no purchase confirmation appeared
actions.note: Step 9: the congratulations popup is the real proof of purchase; tapping it dismisses it and records the outcome
Not purchased (buy button missing, or tapped but failed) — close the purchase dialog

actions.log_skip: No leave/back button found — could not exit the alliance store
actions.note: Leave the store — both purchase outcomes end here; fallbacks ensure we exit the view so the next task starts clean
